title: Zion's Song

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Silent praise rises in Zion's heights
Where promises bloom in morning light
All who wander find their way
To Your courts at break of day

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From mountains to the roaring seas
Your power moves through golden fields of wheat
Every stream and valley sings Your peace
Creation bows in harmony
(Your mercy flows endlessly)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: When our sins grew mountain high
Your mercy poured like rainfall in the night
In Your temple, hope remains
Where worship rises like the grain

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From mountains to the roaring seas
Your power moves through golden fields of wheat
Every stream and valley sings Your peace
Creation bows in harmony
(Your mercy flows endlessly)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The meadows overflow
With flocks of morning snow
The valleys dressed in gold Your wonders now unfold

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: From dawn's first light to evening's close
Your joy springs up wherever mercy flows
Every creature lifts their voice
As heaven and earth rejoice

sections.label: Chorus
lines: From mountains to the roaring seas
Your power moves through golden fields of wheat
Every stream and valley sings Your peace
Creation bows in harmony
(Your mercy flows endlessly)

sections.label: Outro
lines: Creation bows in harmony Your mercy flows endlessly

epigraph: that he may dwell in thy courts
